title: 砺行阿凛
content_json: [{"key":"RI9WD2s6OMuRXn8q","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"Zf65Ez4nbLiZlSek","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.4f2d77d63fbd88","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/355468/2025/4/13/938157.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.735c661239adb","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":[]}]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"zoiRYDDXY5SHn3Gi","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"5edJuanm2dDEVln0","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基础信息","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"砺行阿凛"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者砺行阿凛，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"行事横冲直撞，不计后果的不良少女，暴躁冲动，说话直来直去，一言不合就会跟人大打出手。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"对她而言，只有在帮派才有同伴和归属感，凡事都将帮派成员放在第一位。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"极讲义气，无法轻易舍弃帮派朋友，很容易贸然为他人出头。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"由于她的暴躁和冲动，她所在的帮派在与校外其他帮派冲突的过程中遭遇重创，危急时刻，美梦俱乐部对其出手相助，其帮派成员被美梦俱乐部吸纳收留。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"期间她也在美梦俱乐部受到了勉、胧等可靠大人的引导，深知自己的暴躁脾气会惹来祸端，不断学习武艺提升力量的过程中，也渐渐磨练收敛着牌气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这也是她后来脱离帮派，回到学校的契机。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.03defbe6c9b0c","isOneLine":false,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"s :"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.901c446764fac8","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/389425.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"XfX07nNcKSIzcBPU","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【朋友与义气，就是我的人生信条！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在我最开始想到要成立「炎火帮」的时候，就已经做好了随时为朋友战死的准备。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"之前在那所破学校的时候，我已见过太多不公平不光彩的烂事，又复杂又扭曲的规则，更别提随处可见的霸凌事件……真是令我作呕。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当我想要为他人实行反击的时候，那些所谓的「好学生」们不分青红皂白就给我打上了「不良少女」的标签，更是恶心至极。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不过，我可不认为「不良少女」是什么坏称号，恰恰相反，我正要以「不良」的名号告诉所有人一一我阿凛，才是弱者的救星!"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"今天我终于下定了决心，拉拢了十几位和我年纪相近的强者，组成了专为弱者打抱不平，拔刀相助的「炎火帮」！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"放心吧我的朋友，勇猛正派的不良少女阿凛，一定会为所有遭受不公正的人们，伸张正义！"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【仗义之举——是美梦？还是噩梦？】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「炎火帮」的正义之路并不顺利，好吧，总的来说，是糟糕透了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"今天我们为了报复一个在学校附近收取过路费的混混，尾随他潜入了踯躅街，没成想这家伙是踯躅街地头蛇的儿子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"跟我一起的几个朋友劝我还是先思考对策，再做打算，可那家伙实在过分，竟然对着他那个满脸横肉的老爹说「炎火帮」是个怂货帮派!"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"听到这里，我是一点也忍不下去，拔出武器就冲了出去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但对方的武力显然远远高过我和我的朋友们，经过几轮缠斗，我们很快就被一一制服，然后被五花大绑丢到了仓库里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我和朋友们试着用各种办法自救，可因为武器被收走，身上又全是伤，加上仓库里一片漆黑，折腾到筋疲力尽也没能找到脱身之法。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我不知道他们到底还想关我们多久，但我知道，在这里待得越久，危险就会越大。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"抱着赌一把的心态，我试着站到仓库唯一的通气口处呼救，期待着有正义使者来拯救大家。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我的呼救传了出去，但也很快引起了混混们的注意，他们踹开仓库大门想看看内部的情况，我本以为彻底失去了得救的希望，谁知下一秒就看到一个高大的身影将混混们击倒在地——"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"是美梦俱乐部的胧大姐！"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【磨砺意志，修行武艺，才是真正的武道。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然「炎火帮」的正义之路并不顺利，但好像我们的运气还可以，好吧，我觉得应该是好极了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不知道怎么回事，我的呼救恰好就被在附近的胧大姐听到了，然后就有了她恰好赶到现场将混混击倒的一幕。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在那之后的一段时间里，「炎火帮」就一直在美梦俱乐部的保护下休养，也帮着他们做了不少事情。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在休养的这段日子里，我也跟随胧大姐……哦不，胧小姐，参悟了一些道理。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"勉大哥的那句话怎么说的来着……「冲动只能引来祸端，只有力量和胆识才能让人成长。」，嗯，我很认同。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"还有胧小姐说，「武道不是暴力，而应该是武者的修养。」，嗯，我也很认同。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"上次的事情给了我一个狠狠的教训，要不是胧小姐和美梦俱乐部及时相助，还真不知道会造成什么可怕的后果。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为了提升自己的实力，在胧小姐的建议下，我决定改变一下现有的生活方式。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"首先，我要去拜访问心武馆，开启我身为武者的修行，不断精进自己的武学。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然后，我要返回学校……至少、至少要成为一个有胆有识，不会逃避的强者！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"最后，我要暂时离开「炎火帮」，等我真正完成了修行，再重振帮派的威名！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"就这么决定了！"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.79d1ad3fc224b8","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤/攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"独特的速度增伤机制，速度快的同时，伤害也高，在pvp速攻队伍中十分强势，大招配合启示录打出高额伤害，让对手防不胜防"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.ae7766be5983f","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":"","content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+6狂怒+6极影强袭"}]}]}},{"key":"0.1fa8d9f5c274b8","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":"","content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"启示录"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/993550.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"N5OQIkNaBFjqan73","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
